Sahayak Setu

Empowering Indian Citizens with Information and AI.

Sahayak Setu is a smart eligibility portal designed to help citizens of India discover, verify, and apply for government schemes, services, and subsidies.

Features

Smart Eligibility Wizard: An AI-powered tool that analyzes demographic data (Age, Income, Category) to recommend highly matching government schemes like PM-KISAN, Ayushman Bharat, and PMAY.

Multilingual Support: Available in English, Hindi, Bengali, Telugu, Marathi, and Tamil.

Step-by-Step Guides: Detailed instructions for applying for core documents including Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID, and Passports.

AI Assistant: A built-in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that answers citizen queries regarding government policies.

Official Links

Home: https://sahayak-setu-ten.vercel.app/
